texto: i felt like i was wanting you more than ever..I want to fall asleep with the pure sound of your heart beat, wrapped around your warm arms, feeling your skin against mine and wake up with the sound of your sweet voice and a beautiful smile on a saturday morning.I want to kiss you from head to toe and drown in your carefree laughI want the entirety of you and love you endlessly.....when i wake up this morning and pondered of my wantsit break my heart to realise that my simple wants are nowhere near achievable....
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a gagabriel: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “i felt like i was wanting you more than ever..I want to fall asleep with the pure sound of your h…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, desires, disappointment pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e termino.
